description: Catch Cup team built around the creator's newly acquired Shadow Shiny Gyarados, paired with Galarian Corsola lead and Tinkaton as the safe swap/pivot.
performanceNotes: Shadow Gyarados hits massive neutral damage with Aqua Tail
Tinkaton's Gigaton Hammer is a powerful closing nuke
Core gets broken by Feraligatr + Lickilicky combos

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: I just got SHADOW SHINY Gyarados and took it to the Catch Cup! | Pokémon GO Battle League
